Narrative intro: here's the current dashboard status.

```a2ui
{"version":"0.9","screen":{"title":"Ops HUD","blocks":[{"type":"text","text":"First screen"}]}}
```

After the first screen, keep this note for the operator.

<a2ui>{"version":"0.9","screen":{"title":"Ops HUD 2","blocks":[{"type":"text","text":"Second screen"}]}}</a2ui>

Final narrative wrap-up.
